name: Iraq
summary: Declared force majeure on ALL foreign-operated oilfields (Mar 20). Production cut from 3.3M to 900K bpd. 90%+ of government income from crude. US military camps hit by Iranian drones. Caught between US (ally) and Iran (neighbor/influence).

signals.content: Iranian drones struck coalition military camps near Erbil and Baghdad, wounding US soldiers.
Iraq declared force majeure on all foreign-operated oilfields due to Hormuz disruption. Basra Oil Company production cut from 3.3M to 900K bpd. Iraq depends on crude for 90%+ of income.

edges.context: 2.4M bpd production offline due to force majeure. Additional supply shock on top of Iranian production losses and Hormuz closure.
Iraq's southern oil exports depend on Hormuz transit. Closure made exports impossible, forcing force majeure.
Iran has significant political/military influence in Iraq. Iraqi Shia militias aligned with Iran. Iraq caught between US and Iran.
